description_long: This ornate knife or short sword features a broad, double-edged blade with a faceted, almost crystalline appearance, tapering to a point. The guard is stylized with two upward-curving, green, leaf-like extensions, giving the weapon a botanical motif. The handle is cylindrical and decorated with blue and gold bands, topped with a pink, lotus-bud-shaped pommel. The base of the blade also features a matching pink, lotus-bud-shaped accent, reinforcing the floral theme. The overall design is highly decorative, suggesting ceremonial or fantasy use rather than practical combat. The object appears to be crafted from a combination of metal and painted or enameled materials, with a focus on visual appeal.
description: A decorative knife or short sword with a broad, faceted blade, green leaf-like guard, and a lotus-bud-themed handle and pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blade, the green leaf-like guard, and both pink lotus-bud accents.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle, with the lotus-bud pommel visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the symmetrical design of the blade, guard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and the vertical alignment of the handle and pommel.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, blue and gold bands, lotus-bud pommel, decorative
attribute_ornamentation: lotus-bud accents, colored bands, leaf-like guard
